title: leontodon arenarius
intro: Leontodon arenarius, also known as the Autumn Hawk's-bit or Sea Hawk's-bit, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it effective in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Leontodon arenarius include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and act as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. The plant can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
